title: Saraswati Chalisa
intro: Shri Saraswati Chalisa - Hymn to Goddess Saraswati
meaning:
॥ Shri Saraswati Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Janak janani pad kamal raj, nij mastak par dhari.
Holding the dust of the lotus feet of my parents on my forehead,
Bandau matu Saraswati, buddhi bal de daatari.
I bow to Mother Saraswati, please grant me wisdom and strength.
Purn jagat mein vyapt tav, mahima amit anantu.
You are present in the entire world, and your glory is infinite.
Ramsagar ke paap ko, matu tuhi ab hantu.
O Mother, destroy the sins of Ramsagar (the devotee) now.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Jai shrisakal buddhi balarasi.
Victory to the source of all wisdom and strength.
Jai sarvagya amar avinasi.
Victory to the Omniscient, Immortal, and Indestructible One.
Jai jai jai veenakar dhari.
Victory to you, O holder of the Veena.
Karti sada suhans savari.
You always ride a beautiful swan.
Rup chaturbhujdhari mata.
O Mother, who holds the four-armed form.
Sakal vishwa andar vikhyata.
You are famous throughout the entire world.
Jag mein paap buddhi jab hoti.
When sinful intellect spreads in the world.
Jabahi dharm ki pheeki jyoti.
And the light of righteousness becomes dim.
Tabahi matu le nij avtara.
Then, O Mother, you take your avatar.
Paap heen karti mahi tara.
And liberate the earth by making it sinless.
Valmiki ji the baham gyani.
Valmiki Ji was a great sage.
Tav prasad janai sansara.
The world knows him only by your grace.
Ramayan jo rache banai.
He composed the Ramayana.
Adi kavi ki padvi pai.
And attained the title of the first poet.
Kalidas jo bhaye vikhyata.
Kalidas, who became famous.
Teri kripa drishti se mata.
It was by your grace, O Mother.
Tulsi Sur aadi vidhana.
Scholars like Tulsi and Surdas.
Bhaye aur jo gyani nana.
And many other such wise people.
Tinhahin na aura raheu avalamba.
They had no other support.
Keval kripa aapki amba.
Only your grace, O Mother.
Karahu kripa soi matu bhavani.
O Mother Bhavani, bestow the same grace upon me.
Dukhit deen nij dasahi jani.
Knowing me as your sad and poor servant.
Putra karai apradh bahuta.
A son commits many sins.
Tehi na dharai chit sundar mata.
O beautiful Mother, do not keep that in your mind.
Rakhu laaj janani ab meri.
O Mother, now save my honor.
Vinay karun bahu bhanti ghaneri.
I pray to you in many ways.
Main anath teri avalamba.
I am an orphan, and you are my only support.
Kripa karau jai jai jagadamba.
Grant me grace, victory to you, O Jagadamba.
Madhu kaitabh jo ati balvana.
Madhu and Kaitabh, who were very powerful.
Bahuyuddh Vishnu te thana.
They waged war against Lord Vishnu.
Samar hajar panch mein ghora.
There was a fierce battle for five thousand years.
Phir bhi mukh unse nahin mora.
Yet they did not retreat.
Matu sahay bhayi tehi kala.
At that time, O Mother, you helped.
Buddhi viprit kari khalhala.
And turned the intellect of the wicked against them.
Tehi te mrityu bhayi khal keri.
Because of that, the wicked met their death.
Purvahu matu manorath meri.
O Mother, fulfill my desires.
Chand Mund jo the vikhyata.
Chand and Mund, who were famous.
Chhan mahun sanhareu tehi mata.
Mother, you destroyed them in a moment.
Raktbeej se samarth papi.
The powerful sinner like Raktbeej.
Sur-muni hriday dhara sab kampi.
At whom the hearts of gods and sages trembled.
Kateu sir jim kadli khamba.
You cut his head like a banana stalk.
Bar bar binvau jagadamba.
I bow to Jagadamba again and again.
Jag prasiddh jo Shumbh Nishumbha.
The world-famous Shumbh and Nishumbh.
Chhin mein badhe tahi tu amba.
O Mother, you killed them in an instant.
Bharat-matu buddhi phereu jayi.
You turned the intellect of Bharat's mother (Kaikeyi).
Ramchandra vanvas karai.
Causing Ramchandra to go into exile.
Ehi vidhi Ravan vadh tum kinha.
In this way, you caused the death of Ravana.
Sur nar muni sab kahun sukh dinha.
And brought happiness to all gods, men, and sages.
Ko samarth tav yash gun gana.
Who is capable of singing your praises?
Nigam anadi anant bakhana.
The Vedas describe you as beginningless and endless.
Vishnu Rudra Aj sakahin na mari.
Whom even Vishnu, Rudra, and Brahma could not kill.
Jinki ho tum rakshakari.
And whose protector you are.
Rakt dantika aur Shatakshi.
You are Rakt Dantika and Shatakshi.
Naam apar hai danav bhakshi.
You have countless names as the consumer of demons.
Durgam kaaj dhara par kinha.
You performed difficult tasks on earth.
Durga naam sakal jag linha.
Therefore the whole world calls you Durga.
Durg aadi harni tu mata.
O Mother, you are the remover of all miseries.
Kripa karahu jab jab sukhdata.
O giver of happiness, shower your grace.
Nrip kopit jo maran chahai.
If a king gets angry and wants to kill.
Kanan mein ghere mrig nahai.
Or a lion surrounds one in the forest.
Sagar madhya pot ke bhange.
If a ship breaks in the middle of the sea.
Ati toofan nahin kou sange.
And there is no one to help in a great storm.
Bhoot pret badha ya duhkh mein.
In case of ghosts, spirits, or sorrow.
Ho daridra athva sankat mein.
Or in poverty or crisis.
Naam jape mangal sab hoi.
Everything becomes auspicious by chanting your name.
Sanshay ismein karai na koi.
There should be no doubt about this.
Putrahin jo aatur bhai.
The brother who is distressed due to being childless.
Sabai chhandi poojen ehi mai.
Should leave everything and worship this Mother.
Karai path nit yah chalisa.
One who recites this Chalisa daily.
Hoy putra sundar gun eesa.
Will be blessed with a beautiful and virtuous son.
Dhupadik naivedya chadhawai.
One who offers incense and food offerings.
Sankat rahit avashya ho javai.
Will definitely be free from crisis.
Bhakti matu ki karai hamesha.
One who always devotes themselves to the Mother.
Nikat na aavai tahi kalesha.
No trouble will come near them.
Bandi path karen shat bara.
One who recites this hundred times.
Bandi pash dur ho sara.
All their chains and bonds will be removed.
Karahu kripa bhavmukti bhavani.
O Bhavani, show grace and liberate me from the cycle of rebirth.
Mo kahan das sada nij jani.
Always consider me as your servant.

॥ Doha ॥

Mata suraj kanti tav, andhakar mam roop.
O Mother, your radiance is like the sun, and I am like darkness.
Duban te raksha karahu, parun na main bhav-koop.
Save me from drowning, so I do not fall into the well of this world.
Bal buddhi vidya dehun mohi, sunahu Saraswati matu.
Grant me strength, wisdom, and knowledge; O Mother Saraswati, listen.
Adham Ramsagarahin tum, ashray deu punatu.
O Mother, give shelter and purify this lowly Ramsagar.
